historia.origen_fallback: History of the origins of Grupo Exportador del Campo...
historia.fundadores_fallback: Our legacy is the foundation of our company.
historia.hito1_desc: Mr. Ramiro Vizcaíno begins the production and commercialization of vegetables in Loreto, Zacatecas.
historia.hito2_desc: Construction of the first pre-cooling plant in Zacatecas.
historia.hito3_desc: Purchase of the first agricultural ranch, consolidating control over production.
historia.hito4_desc: Opening of two points of sale in Monterrey and Guadalajara.
historia.hito5_desc: Transition from family business to institution: formal constitution of Grupo Exportador del Campo.
historia.hito6_desc: First official export as Grupo Exportador del Campo.
historia.hito7_desc: Opening of the Distribution Center in San Nicolás de los Garza, Nuevo León.
historia.hito8_desc: Inauguration of the second pre-cooling plant, doubling operational capacity.
historia.hito9_desc: We continue to grow with the vision of transcending as a world-class agro-industrial institution.
